channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Persona 6 Images Leak Ahead of Summer Game Fest
item.description: Leaked images of Persona 6 have surfaced online, stirring excitement among fans. Sega is reportedly behind the takedowns of these images.

item.title: Black Ops 7's Classic Mode Addresses Player Concerns
item.description: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 introduces a new Classic mode, addressing player feedback and enhancing gameplay experience. Players are enjoying the significant changes.

item.title: Microsoft's AI Chief Critiques Anthropic Models' Costs
item.description: Microsoft's AI chief claims Anthropic's models are too expensive. The company is focusing on developing more affordable in-house AI solutions.

item.title: Student Identifies Teacher's ADHD Through Handwriting
item.description: A student recognized their teacher's ADHD by analyzing her handwriting, sparking discussions about ADHD traits. The incident has gone viral on social media.

item.title: Behind the Scenes of The Adventures of Elliot
item.description: Square Enix and Claytechworks release a 13-minute making-of video for The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales. Fans get an inside look at the game's development.

item.title: Amazon Revamps Gaming Strategy with New Titles
item.description: Amazon's new gaming strategy includes partnerships with James Bond and AI-powered games. The company aims to strengthen its position in the gaming market.

item.title: Meta Launches AI Creator Assistant on Facebook
item.description: Meta introduces a new AI creator assistant on Facebook, providing personalized recommendations for content creators. This tool simplifies performance analysis and engagement strategies.

item.title: Apple and MLB Reveal July Baseball Schedule
item.description: Apple and Major League Baseball announce the July schedule for 'Friday Night Baseball' on Apple TV, featuring exciting matchups. Fans can look forward to a thrilling month of games.

item.title: Destiny 2 Ending Content Sparks Controversy
item.description: Bungie announces the end of ongoing content for Destiny 2, shifting focus to new projects. The decision has upset many fans, including industry peers.

item.title: Helldivers 2 Introduces New Roguelite Mode
item.description: Helldivers 2 is set to launch a new roguelite mode called Planet Warfronts, enhancing gameplay with fresh mechanics. Developers aim to improve the overall experience.

item.title: Kratos Will Return in Future God of War Games
item.description: Sony Santa Monica reassures fans that Kratos will return in future God of War titles, despite recent game developments. The beloved character remains central to the franchise.

item.title: Cassette Beasts 2002 Announced for Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: A sequel to the original Cassette Beasts, titled Cassette Beasts 2002, has been revealed for the Nintendo Switch 2. Fans are eager for more details.

item.title: Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve Preview
item.description: A preview of Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve reveals insights into the game's military narrative and pilot training. Players can expect an engaging storyline.

item.title: Marathon Season 2: The Good and Bad
item.description: Bungie's Marathon season 2 introduces new features but also faces criticism for disrupting core gameplay. Players share mixed reactions to the changes.

item.title: Nvidia RTX Spark PCs Expected to Be Expensive
item.description: Upcoming Nvidia RTX Spark PCs are anticipated to have high price points, designed for advanced AI applications. Consumers brace for the financial impact.
